name: notes-rg-qa
description: Model-agnostic note-library Q&A skill that relies on rg and direct note reads.

interface.shortDescription: Use rg to search raw notes and answer from evidence.
interface.longDescription: A repo-local, model-agnostic skill for note-library question answering. It uses rg plus direct note reads and answers only from opened note evidence.
defaultPrompt: Use rg to answer from raw library notes.
Search the library with multiple short queries before concluding.
Quote evidence paths from notes you actually opened.
